name: Build League
author: Poki
description: Build League is a flying game where you design, build, and upgrade your very own plane to soar farther than ever! Customize your aircraft with different parts, boost efficiency with better engines and fuel, and dodge tricky obstacles across unique maps. Earn cash from every flight to keep improving your dream plane. Ready to take off and see how far you can fly? How to play Build League? Move: WASD or arrow keys Camera: Use the mouse to adjust the camera Start: F Shhop: T Quest: Q Emotes: G Who created Build League? Build League is created by OnRush Studio. Play their other games on Poki: Soccer League , Tribals.io , Venge.io , Eat the world , Shipo.io , Arcane Archer , Jungle Friends , Burger Bounty , MagicLand.io , Fishing League , Sprint League | Brainrot Tsunami and TexasWorm.io ! How can I play Build League for free? You can play Build League for free on Poki. Can I play Build League on mobile devices and desktop? Build League can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Build League with my friend? Yes! Build League is a single or online multiplayer game so you can play with your friend!
